title: Interim
content:
The earth is motionless
    And poised in space...
    A great bird resting in its flight
    Between the alleys of the stars.
    It is the wind's hour off....
    The wind has nestled down among the corn....
    The two speak privately together,
    Awaiting the whirr of wings.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "Interim", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
